ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "formatted_address" TEXT /* Formatted address of the business */,
  "business_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the business (e.g., OPERATIONAL, CLOSED) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "vicinity" TEXT /* General vicinity or location description */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., spa, painter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business from the businesses table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category from the categories table */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is the primary category for the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, admin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business whose status is being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the business (e.g., OPERATIONAL, CLOSED) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_status_history_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_status_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business for which the location is recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Formatted address of the business location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business for which analytics are tracked */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the business profile has received */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated based on user interactions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was last updated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the admin user (e.g., full access, read-only) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the admin user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the image is the primary image for the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_images_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
